title: hesperis arvensis
intro: Hesperis arvensis, also known as Dame's Rocket, is a perennial flowering plant in the mustard family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is said to have several health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating skin conditions like eczema and acne. Hesperis arvensis can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
